project.title: COS7 GlyT2 variants associated with hyperekplexia
project.projectDescription: Multiplexed LC-MS/MS analysis of heterologous cells expressing a new GlyT2 variant found in an infantile patient diagnosed with hyperekplexia.
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: Protein extraction from cells On-filter Protein digestion Isobaric peptide labeling LC-MS/MS analysis
project.dataProcessingProtocol: Protein identification with Proteome Discoverer Statistical analysis with iSanXoT
